instruction_prefix: Given a patient's electronic healthcare record (EHR) as a newline separated list with dates and times, retrieve relevant passages that answer the query:
guo_los: will the patient stay in the hospital for more than 7 days
guo_readmission: will the patient be readmitted to the hospital within 30 days
guo_icu: will the patient be transferred to the intensive care unit
new_acutemi: has the patient an acute myocardial infarction
chexpert: what are the chest x-ray findings of the patient
chexpert_No Finding: will the chest x-ray of this patient show no finding
chexpert_Enlarged Cardiomediastinum: will the chest x-ray of this patient show an enlarged cardiomediastinum
chexpert_Cardiomegaly: will the chest x-ray of this patient show cardiomegaly
chexpert_Lung Lesion: will the chest x-ray of this patient show a lung lesion
chexpert_Lung Opacity: will the chest x-ray of this patient show a lung opacity
chexpert_Edema: will the chest x-ray of this patient show edema
chexpert_Consolidation: will the chest x-ray of this patient show consolidation
chexpert_Pneumonia: will the chest x-ray of this patient show pneumonia
chexpert_Atelectasis: will the chest x-ray of this patient show atelectasis
chexpert_Pneumothorax: will the chest x-ray of this patient show a pneumothorax
chexpert_Pleural Effusion: will the chest x-ray of this patient show pleural effusion
chexpert_Pleural Other: will the chest x-ray of this patient show other pleural findings
chexpert_Fracture: will the chest x-ray of this patient show a fracture
chexpert_Support Devices: will the chest x-ray of this patient show support devices
